candidate_definitions.text: Visual localization made easy with hloc

This is `hloc`, a modular toolbox for state-of-the-art 6-DoF visual localization. It implements [Hierarchical Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/1812.03506), leveraging image retrieval and feature matching, and is fast, accurate, and scalable. This codebase combines and makes e…
An image retrieval model for any localization task
An image retrieval model for any localization task, which achieves SOTA on most VPR datasets, including indoor and outdoor ones.
